Step 3: (🥟 ⊕ (🪵 ⊕ 🥟)) = (🥟 ⊕ 🥟)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 4: (🥟 ⊕ 🥟) = 🪵    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪵

Continuing, with a correction to the earlier reduction:

Step 3: ((🪸 ⊕ 🐌) ⊕ (🐌 ⊕ (🐌 ⊕ 🐌))) = (🐌 ⊕ (🐌 ⊕ (🐌 ⊕ 🐌)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 4: (🐌 ⊕ (🐌 ⊕ (🐌 ⊕ 🐌))) = (🐌 ⊕ (🐌 ⊕ 🐌))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 5: (🐌 ⊕ (🐌 ⊕ 🐌)) = (🐌 ⊕ 🐌)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🐌 ⊕ 🐌) = 🐌    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🐌

Step 4: (🧿 ⊕ 🧿) = 🫑    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 2: (🥟 ⊕ ((🪵 ⊕ 🪈) ⊕ 🪵)) = (🥟 ⊕ (🪵 ⊕ 🪵))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 3: (🥟 ⊕ (🪵 ⊕ 🪵)) = (🥟 ⊕ 🪈)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 4: (🥟 ⊕ 🪈) = 🥟    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🥟

Step 3: (🪵 ⊕ (🧄 ⊕ 🪵)) = (🪵 ⊕ 🧄)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 4: (🪵 ⊕ 🧄) = 🥟    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🥟

Step 2: ((🫑 ⊕ (🦎 ⊕ 🫑)) ⊕ 🌵) = ((🫑 ⊕ 🦎) ⊕ 🌵)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 3: ((🫑 ⊕ 🦎) ⊕ 🌵) = (🦎 ⊕ 🌵)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 4: (🦎 ⊕ 🌵) = 🦎    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🦎

Step 3: ((🥟 ⊕ 🐌) ⊕ (🧿 ⊕ 🐌)) = (🧿 ⊕ (🧿 ⊕ 🐌))    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 4: (🧿 ⊕ (🧿 ⊕ 🐌)) = (🧿 ⊕ 🧿)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 5: (🧿 ⊕ 🧿) = 🧿    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🧿

Step 3: (🪬 ⊕ (🪈 ⊕ 🧄)) = (🪬 ⊕ 🧄)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 4: (🪬 ⊕ 🧄) = 🪈    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪈

Step 3: (🥟 ⊕ (🦔 ⊕ 🦔)) = (🥟 ⊕ 🦔)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 4: (🥟 ⊕ 🦔) = 🪈    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪈

Step 3: (🪺 ⊕ (🧶 ⊕ 🪺)) = (🪺 ⊕ 🧶)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 4: (🪺 ⊕ 🧶) = 🧶    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🧶

Step 5: (🫧 ⊗ inv(🫧)) = (🫧 ⊗ 🪤)    [by inv]  
Step 6: (🫧 ⊗ 🪤) = ((🫧 ⊕ 🫧) ⊕ 🪤)    [by definition of ⊗]  
Step 7: ((🫧 ⊕ 🫧) ⊕ 🪤) = (🧿 ⊕ 🪤)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 8: (🧿 ⊕ 🪤) = 🪤    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪤

Step 5: (🪣 ⊕ (inv(🧊) ⊕ inv(🧊))) = (🪣 ⊕ (🧁 ⊕ 🧁))    [by inv]
Step 6: (🪣 ⊕ (🧁 ⊕ 🧁)) = (🪣 ⊕ 🧁)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🪣 ⊕ 🧁) = 🪼    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪼

Correction: Step 4 should be inv((🧲 ⊗ 🧲)). Continuing from there:

Step 5: inv((🧲 ⊗ 🧲)) = inv(((🧲 ⊕ 🧲) ⊕ 🧲))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: inv(((🧲 ⊕ 🧲) ⊕ 🧲)) = inv((🌵 ⊕ 🧲))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: inv((🌵 ⊕ 🧲)) = inv(🪨)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: inv(🪨) = 🪆    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪆

Step 5: (🪵 ⊗ inv(inv(🫧))) = (🪵 ⊗ inv(🐙))    [by definition of inv]
Step 6: (🪵 ⊗ inv(🐙)) = (🪵 ⊗ 🪼)    [by definition of inv]
Step 7: (🪵 ⊗ 🪼) = ((🪵 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ 🪼)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 8: ((🪵 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ 🪼) = (🪵 ⊕ 🪼)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 9: (🪵 ⊕ 🪼) = 🪼    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪼

Correction: Step 3 should have been 🧁, not 🪻. Continuing from there:

Step 4: ((🧊 ⊕ 🫑) ⊗ (🧊 ⊗ 🧊)) = (🧁 ⊗ (🧊 ⊗ 🧊))    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 5: (🧁 ⊗ (🧊 ⊗ 🧊)) = (🧁 ⊗ ((🧊 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🧊))    [by definition of ⊗]  
Step 6: (🧁 ⊗ ((🧊 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🧊)) = (🧁 ⊗ (🫑 ⊕ 🧊))    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 7: (🧁 ⊗ (🫑 ⊕ 🧊)) = (🧁 ⊗ 🧊)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 8: (🧁 ⊗ 🧊) = ((🧁 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🧁)    [by definition of ⊗]  
Step 9: ((🧁 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🧁) = (🪻 ⊕ 🧁)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 10: (🪻 ⊕ 🧁) = 🫑    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 6: (🪻 ⊛ ((🪵 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ 🐙)) = (🪻 ⊛ (🪈 ⊕ 🐙))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🪻 ⊛ (🪈 ⊕ 🐙)) = (🪻 ⊛ 🪻)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🪻 ⊛ 🪻) = inv(🪻 ⊕ 🪻)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: inv(🪻 ⊕ 🪻) = inv(🪵)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: inv(🪵) = 🪻    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪻

Step 5: ((🪩 ⊕ 🪼) ⊗ 🪩) = (🫑 ⊗ 🪩)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 6: (🫑 ⊗ 🪩) = ((🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🪩)    [by definition of ⊗]  
Step 7: ((🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🪩) = (🦩 ⊕ 🪩)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 8: (🦩 ⊕ 🪩) = 🦩    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🦩

The previous Step 4 used the wrong table entry. Corrected continuation:

Step 4: (inv((🧶 ⊗ 🦔)) ⊗ ((🦔 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ (🦔 ⊕ 🧶))) = (inv(🦔) ⊗ ((🦔 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ (🦔 ⊕ 🧶)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 5: (inv(🦔) ⊗ ((🦔 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ (🦔 ⊕ 🧶))) = (🫧 ⊗ ((🦔 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ (🦔 ⊕ 🧶)))    [by inv]
Step 6: (🫧 ⊗ ((🦔 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ (🦔 ⊕ 🧶))) = (🫧 ⊗ (🧶 ⊗ (🦔 ⊕ 🧶)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 7: (🫧 ⊗ (🧶 ⊗ (🦔 ⊕ 🧶))) = (🫧 ⊗ (🧶 ⊗ 🫧))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🫧 ⊗ (🧶 ⊗ 🫧)) = (🫧 ⊗ 🫧)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🫧 ⊗ 🫧) = 🪸    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪸

Step 6: (🧄 ⊛ inv((🧊 ⊗ 🪨))) = inv(🧄 ⊕ inv((🧊 ⊗ 🪨)))    [by definition of ⊛]  
Step 7: inv(🧄 ⊕ inv((🧊 ⊗ 🪨))) = inv(🧄 ⊕ inv(🧁))    [by ⊗ table]  
Step 8: inv(🧄 ⊕ inv(🧁)) = inv(🧄 ⊕ 🧄)    [by inv]  
Step 9: inv(🧄 ⊕ 🧄) = inv(🧊)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 10: inv(🧊) = 🪨    [by inv]  

Final Output: 🪨

Step 5: (🦔 ⊛ (🥟 ⊕ (🪣 ⊕ 🪣))) = (🦔 ⊛ (🥟 ⊕ 🪵))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🦔 ⊛ (🥟 ⊕ 🪵)) = (🦔 ⊛ 🦔)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🦔 ⊛ 🦔) = ((🦔 ⊗ 🦔) ⊗ 🦔)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 8: ((🦔 ⊗ 🦔) ⊗ 🦔) = (🦔 ⊗ 🦔)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🦔 ⊗ 🦔) = 🦔    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🦔

Correction to the previous line: 🪬 ⊕ 🪬 = 🧲. Continuing from the corrected expression:

Step 9: (rot((🧲 ⊕ 🪬)) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (rot(🧲) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 10: (rot(🧲) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🧊 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by rot]  
Step 11: (🧊 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🧊 ⊞ inv(rot(🥟)))    [by ⊗ table]  
Step 12: (🧊 ⊞ inv(rot(🥟))) = (🧊 ⊞ inv(🪭))    [by rot]  
Step 13: (🧊 ⊞ inv(🪭)) = (🧊 ⊞ 🧊)    [by inv]  
Step 14: (🧊 ⊞ 🧊) = ((🧊 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🧊)    [by definition of ⊞]  
Step 15: ((🧊 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🧊) = (🪬 ⊕ 🧊)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 16: (🪬 ⊕ 🧊) = 🪬    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪬
